plugins.name: redc-plugin-clash-config
plugins.description: 场景部署后自动生成 Clash (Shadowsocks) 代理配置文件
plugins.description_en: Auto-generate Clash proxy config (Shadowsocks) after deployment
plugins.author: wgpsec

plugins.name: redc-plugin-cloudflare-dns
plugins.description: 场景部署后自动更新 Cloudflare DNS A 记录指向实例 IP
plugins.description_en: Auto-update Cloudflare DNS A record to point to instance IP after deployment
plugins.author: wgpsec

plugins.name: redc-plugin-example
plugins.description: RedC 示例插件 — 展示插件开发的基本结构和功能
plugins.description_en: RedC Example Plugin — Demonstrates basic plugin structure and features
plugins.author: wgpsec

plugins.name: redc-plugin-upload-r2
plugins.description: 场景部署后将生成的配置文件上传到 Cloudflare R2 存储桶
plugins.description_en: Upload generated config files to Cloudflare R2 bucket after deployment
plugins.author: wgpsec
